heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 220313 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22031336:1210., , .Oct. 20, 1978Pub. L. 95–493, § 1092 Stat. 1646The word “when” is omitted as unnecessary.
